choices.text: totalFee = (baseFee + priorityFee) × gasUsed. baseFee adjusts to block fullness, burnt; priorityFee tip goes to validator; maxFeePerGas caps total. Reduces user overpayment vs. old auction model.
Replace with same nonce 5 + higher gas + value 0 to self. Validators take higher-gas tx; replaces stuck one. All later-nonce txs unstuck. Standard 'speed up' / 'cancel' in wallets.

questions.explanation: Replace stuck nonce with higher-gas self-tx.
